content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Can't Debug Code
content.seo_description: Learn how to master client workflows and overcome debugging hurdles. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging gridlock, implement a systematic client-side feedback loop. By integrating Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for intelligent error resolution, you transform chaotic bugs into structured tasks. This workflow ensures you ship clean, production-ready code while maintaining clear communication with your clients throughout the development cycle.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client is waiting for a demo, and you’re staring at a terminal full of red text, stuck in an endless cycle of 'trial-and-error' debugging. That sinking feeling of technical paralysis isn't just frustrating; it’s a direct threat to your freelance reputation and your bottom line.

But what if debugging wasn't an obstacle, but a refined part of your delivery pipeline? By shifting your mindset from 'fixing bugs' to 'optimizing workflows,' you regain control. This guide bridges the gap between frustration and mastery, utilizing modern AI tools to turn your development environment into a high-efficiency engine.

steps.title: Establish the Error Context
steps.description: Before fixing, you must isolate. Capture the exact stack trace and user state to avoid 'it works on my machine' syndrome.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided error logs and trace the execution path to identify the specific module causing the failure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze terminal output and map the error to the specific file and function'

steps.title: Generate a Reproduction Script
steps.description: Create a minimal test case that triggers the bug consistently to verify your fix without breaking existing features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal, standalone reproduction script for the identified bug in the current codebase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a test file that triggers this specific error consistently'

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use AI to cross-reference your codebase patterns against the error, catching logic flaws you might have missed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a root cause analysis on the codebase, comparing current logic against best practices for this framework.

steps.title: Implement the Surgical Fix
steps.description: Apply the fix using a modular approach, ensuring the change doesn't introduce regression bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a surgical fix for the identified bug. Provide the updated code snippet and an explanation of the change.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'refactor the function to handle null values as identified in the analysis'

steps.title: Client-Ready Verification
steps.description: Generate a summary of the fix for the client to demonstrate transparency and professional rigor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a concise, professional summary of the bug, the fix, and the prevention strategy for a client update.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a brief update for the client explaining the fix and confirming system stability'

pro_tips: Always commit your 'broken state' to a separate branch before debugging; it’s your safety net for complex refactors.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for every bug you fix; this builds a regression suite that earns client trust.
If an error persists, delete your node_modules or cache; 30% of 'impossible' bugs are just stale build artifacts.
Document your debugging process in a README.md file; clients pay a premium for organized, maintainable documentation.
Set a 20-minute 'AI-first' timer; if you haven't found the root cause by then, rotate your prompt focus to architectural patterns.
content.next_steps: After mastering this flow, integrate these steps into a standard 'Bug Resolution Protocol' template you provide to all new clients.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop fighting your code and start delivering value. Stop wasting billable hours on manual debugging and start scaling your freelance business with AI-powered efficiency. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
